entry.title: Abandoned Avatar
entry.summary:
Author: SterekTw

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 170,104Chapters: 41/?Kudos: 228

Summary: After being tortured by Gerard Stiles gets kicked out of the pack and abonded by his friends. The sheriff sends him to his mother's brother to stay for the summer but the world is in danger and Stiles and his new friends seem to be the only ones who can save it..

entry.title: By My Side
entry.summary:
Author: HyperDoctor11

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,362Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Genevive Stilinski is no ordinary mundane as she was led to believe her entire life. She learns on her eighteenth birthday that she's half-Shadowhunter and half-Demon, a Warlock. Her mother's secret. All the legends are true. Gen happens to be one of those legends. Genevive doesn't expect her baby cousin, Clary Fray's, own eighteenth birthday to blow up in their faces when Jocelyn goes missing and the two of them are taken to a Shadowhunter Institute. Gen must come to an understanding within herself about who she is and whose side she is on. On thing is for certain. Genevive's life will never go back to the way it was before.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_A

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,408Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 42

Summary: Seems like everyone BUT Stiles is in on a secret involving Stiles and Derek yet no one is willing to help the poor human and let him know. Meanwhile Derek is trying desperately to not show any emotions that might hint at the truth. All of this is going on when the pack is under attack by a strange wolf pack threatening to take over the Hale land.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,982Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: Remember me
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,305Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 89

Summary: The other teen raised an inquisitive eyebrow at him when Scott called his name, looking entirely surprised that Scott even knew it. Both of the teenagers looked past Scott's shoulder, where the pack was standing united, trying their best not to overwhelm Stiles but anxiously waiting for him to acknowledge them. Maybe with a hug? It had been a long time. "Do you know these people?" the girl inclined her head and whispered into his ear.Her question earned a casual shrug from Stiles, who whispered back a flat, "No."

entry.title: The Last Son and the Prince of Sorcery
entry.summary:
Author: emperorpalpantene

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,863Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 14

Summary: Stiles Stilinski arrives in Metropolis with seven boxes, an unmade bed, and approximately forty minutes before Vernon Boyd ruins his move-in day. The city's welcome comes in the form of two heavily mutated, biologically engineered creatures tearing through Lakeshore Boulevard — and one very handsome man with bunny teeth and a cape who introduces himself by landing in a crater and smiling like he means it. He hasn't even unpacked yet.

entry.title: Another Poly Story
entry.summary:
Author: HolmesMoriarty

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,403Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 127

Summary: “That’s what I wanted to talk to you about.” Stiles’ world falls apart after hearing this. It was a normal day, like any other, when his boyfriend of five years prepared a meal for them inside their apartment. Stiles thought he would be getting engaged tonight because he had never seen Derek cook even once. It was always Stiles’ thing, so he expected something, but not that.... “Stiles?” Derek asks as Stiles is frozen in place. His boyfriend sighs. “You don’t like the idea.” Of course, Stiles doesn’t!!! “What... Derek.” He closes his eyes, trying to breathe correctly. “Where is this coming from?” Derek opens his mouth, but Stiles isn’t done. “We’ve been together for five years, not once you expressed that you might be polyamorous. Not even once. So, you, asking out of the blue to open our relationship, doesn’t make much sense.”

entry.title: Threshold of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: Infernos

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 61,819Chapters: 8/18Kudos: 8

Summary: The Druid Council needs Stiles's help. Eight hundred years ago, druids made a catastrophic mistake, creating Tairseach Folús, a dimensional entity that feeds on supernatural life force. After devastating losses, seventeen druids sacrificed themselves to create a prison outside of our reality where the entity would be contained forever. Seventy-five years ago, a rogue druid discovered records of the prison and relocated it, anchoring it to the ley lines beneath San Francisco, where it began to degrade. The Councils formed a coalition with other supernaturals to reinforce the seals, but in this reality, those seals won't last. Now, a vengeful hunter family has allied with the druid and his followers. They intend to shatter the prison during the autumn equinox, bind the monster to their will, and use it to systematically wipe out the supernaturals. Stiles has eighteen days to stop them and find a way to send Tairseach back where it came from, before it consumes every supernatural being on the West Coast...and beyond

entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,539Chapters: 7/16Kudos: 17

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: Someone Else's Tupperware
entry.summary:
Author: ModeratelyScathed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,843Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 184

Summary: The funny thing is, Stiles actually has no idea who just climbed through his window. Doesn't really care, either. All he wants to do is catch a few hours of uninterrupted sleep before the nightmares drag him back to consciousness. Again. Still, he expects some sort of snarky response if it's Derek or Peter. Or maybe the vocal embodiment of Scott's puppy dog eyes if it's his best friend. He doesn't expect several seconds of silence. And he definitely doesn't expect the sudden and unmistakable thump of a body hitting the ground.

entry.title: In which the Protagonists are stupid
entry.summary:
Author: ani_18907

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,661Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Thomas didn‘t know what he expected to see but not a whole room covered in white. Everything was white. The bed, the sheets, the walls, the ceiling. Hell, even he himself was white. He could use some sunlight.He looked around the room. Another bed but empty. A small closet next to the window. A chair, another chair and another chair with a sleeping boy on it.Wait.Why did this boy seem like someone he should recognize? It took Thomas one, two, three seconds to puzzle the picture together.And then he let out a scream, high pitched because his voice wasn‘t in use for some time. It sounded raspy and barely like his own voice but Thomas felt the vibrations in his neck so he was sure he was the one screaming. Or: Thomas and Stiles are twins and Thomas wakes up in Beacon Hills after everything that WCKD has done to him. While trying to navigate in his new life he finally has time to understand some of his feelings. And maybe he can help his twin with his own. But when their grandparents suddenly come to visit everything becomes to much.

entry.title: The Extremely Unofficial Guide to Beacon Hills Boarding School
entry.summary:
Author: randomreader46

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,266Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Winning a scholarship to Beacon Hills Preparatory is supposed to be Stiles Stilinski’s fresh start.Instead, he gets rich kids with trust funds, a campus that looks suspiciously like a murder mystery setting, a new best friend within approximately ten minutes, and Derek Hale — Beacon’s perpetually scowling lacrosse captain, who seems to dislike Stiles on sight.Honestly? Rude.______________________Tags will update as the fic progresses to prevent spoilers

entry.title: Search for the Hale Relic
entry.summary:
Author: Goddess47

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,155Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 51

Summary: Derek Hale has hired Spark Stiles to help him retrieve the Hale Relic being held on Argent Land. There is a rumor that the Relic is to be destroyed by the Argents soon, so they need to find the Relic, steal it from the Argents, and return to Hale land with a deadline over their heads.

  • sterekreversequickie2026

entry.title: count with me
entry.summary:
Author: JellyBeanFusion

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,078Chapters: 16/16Kudos: 314

Summary: What if someone actually noticed how badly Stiles was doing before he was taken over by an evil trickster spirit? What if that someone was Derek Hale? OR What if you take the entirety of season 3B and put it in a Sterek shaped blender?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
